title: Aurae!
description: A small Mod that add new ambient effects to the Minecraft!
body:
# APOLOGISE FOR NOT UPDATING THE MOD!!! ## This is year I'm preparing for my IGCSE Exams, I'll be back to Modding after 8 months. Thanks youall the supports!

About The Project

A small Minecraft Mod that add new ambient effects to the Minecraft!

🖥️ Need a server? Check out BisectHosting! --- ## Features ### Blocks * Eye of Ender placement * End Portal * End Gateway * Sculk Catalyst spreading * Water Cauldron splashing * Lava Cauldron popping * Fire * Campfire * Torch * Candle * Trial Spawner summoning mobs * Vault rewarding effects ### Items * Eye of Ender flying ### Entities * Blaze sparkles * Enderman * Endermite --- ## Help Us translate The Mod On Crowdin!
Special Thanks to our Translators: - suoyukii - zh_cn.json - yeoxuhang - zh_cn.json, zh_tw.json - xz123456xz - zh_tw.json - veroxuniverse - de_de.json - facu_aguinaga - es_es.json, es_ar.json - bombmee - pl_pl.json
--- ## Support Us on Patreon!
Special Thanks to our Supporters: -
--- ### Faq - Q. Where can I report the issue? - A. Please report the issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/ambiance/issues) - Q. More Questions? - Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/PUJ42rkRBY) for more helps about the Mod! --- ### Credit * [End Portal Placement Sound Effect from Minecraft Dungeon](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:End_Portal)

Discord Server · Report Bug · Request Feature · License
